title: Provider Lifecycle Record
description: Per-provider lifecycle state record tracking current status, flag details, review assignment, employer network membership, and full transition history. Every transition appends to transition_history and emits an audit event (event_type: provider_status_changed) per ops/audit_trail_schema.json.

npi.description: 10-digit National Provider Identifier. Immutable after creation.

status_since.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the current status was entered. Updated on every transition.

previous_status.description: The status immediately before the current one. Null if this is the provider's first status (i.e., pending_review at onboarding).

flag_reason.description: Short human-readable reason for the current flag or suspension. Non-null only when current_status is 'flagged' or 'suspended'. Null otherwise.

flag_details.description: Structured details about the flag or suspension trigger. Shape varies by trigger type. Null when current_status is not 'flagged' or 'suspended'.

trigger_type.description: The category of event that caused the flag or suspension.

score_drop_delta.description: Points dropped in the triggering scoring cycle. Populated when trigger_type is 'score_drop'.

anomaly_event_id.description: Audit event ID of the anomaly_detected event that triggered this flag. Populated when trigger_type is 'anomaly_detected'.

dispute_id.description: Identifier of the dispute that triggered this flag. Populated when trigger_type is 'dispute_filed'.

notes.description: Free-text notes from the reviewer or system.

review_assigned_to.description: User ID (e.g., 'user:jsmith') of the ops team member assigned to review this provider. Null when no active review is in progress.

review_due_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime by which the assigned review must be completed per the applicable SLA. Null when no active review is in progress.

employer_networks.description: List of employer IDs whose networks include this provider. Used to route employer notifications on status transitions.

transition_history.description: Append-only ordered list of all status transitions this provider has undergone, from oldest to most recent. Never modified after insertion.

transition_event.title: Lifecycle Transition Event
transition_event.description: A single status transition. Immutable after creation. Each entry corresponds to exactly one audit trail event.

from_status.description: The status before this transition. Null for the initial onboarding entry.

to_status.description: The status entered by this transition.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when this transition occurred. Set by the system; never client-supplied.

trigger.description: Human-readable description of what caused this transition (e.g., 'safety_gate_pass', 'score_drop_24pts', 'dispute_resolved_favorable', 'sla_breach_day30').

actor.description: Who executed the transition. Use 'system' for automated transitions; use authenticated user ID (e.g., 'user:jsmith') for manual transitions.

audit_event_id.description: UUID of the corresponding provider_status_changed event in the audit trail (ops/audit_trail_schema.json). Enables cross-referencing between lifecycle record and audit log.

examples.flag_reason: Score dropped 24 points in Q1 2026 refresh cycle

flag_details.notes: Drop primarily driven by new adverse event data from CMS Q1 release.
